OrgStructure.OverextendedSevere: Overextended! Severe: –2 to rolls, no new units.
OrgStructure.Name: Name:

OrgAttributes.Title: Attributes
OrgAttributes.MIPTooltip: Manpower Impairment: penalises Force and Intel rolls.
OrgAttributes.RIPTooltip: Reputation Impairment: penalises Influence and Comms rolls.
OrgAttributes.RepPoolTooltip: Reputation pool = Size + Budget ({total} pts). Distribute between Morale Perm and Reputation Perm.
OrgAttributes.MPTooltip: Manpower Pool: Size × 10. Spent on unit activation and aspects.
OrgAttributes.RPTooltip: Resource Pool: Budget × 10. Spent on unit activation and aspects.
OrgAttributes.OverextendedSevereDetail: Severe: –2 to rolls, no new units.
OrgAttributes.MoraleTooltip: Perm caps Cohesion / Integrity / Sympathizers / Ruthlessness. Temp: spend for +Force / +Intel rolls. Resets to Perm on downtime.
OrgAttributes.ReputationTooltip: Prestige. Perm gates unit tiers & recovery rate. Temp: spend for +Influence / +Comms rolls (costs 1 RP/pt). Resets to Perm on downtime.

OrgConflict.Title: Conflict
OrgConflict.MaxTierTooltip: Unit Tier Gate: Maximum Level derived from External Reputation.
OrgConflict.OverextendedSevere: Overextended! Severe: –2 to rolls, no new units.
OrgConflict.DropCommander: Drop a character here to assign a commander
OrgConflict.L33tTooltip: L33t (coding skill): {cost} · cap {cap} (size + allegiance mod) · costs {mp}MP {rp}RP
OrgConflict.GrokTooltip: Grok (cultural/tech understanding): {cost} · cap {cap} (size + allegiance mod) · costs {mp}MP {rp}RP
OrgConflict.PwnTooltip: Pwn (viciousness / law-breaking): {cost} · cap {cap} (size + allegiance mod) · costs {mp}MP {rp}RP
OrgConflict.SympathizersTooltip: Sympathizers: {cost} · cap {cap} · costs {mp}MP {rp}RP · drives Psyop phase bonus
OrgConflict.ShadeWhiteTooltip: White: cheap sympathizers, costly ruthlessness (cap 2). Morale does not cap sympathizers.
OrgConflict.ShadeGreyTooltip: Grey: baseline costs, no hard caps beyond size/Morale.
OrgConflict.ShadeBlackTooltip: Black: cheap ruthlessness, costly sympathizers (cap 2). Morale does not cap ruthlessness. Phase 7 bonus is halved.
OrgConflict.CurrentEffect: Current effect based on completed phases
OrgConflict.NoActiveCampaigns: No active campaigns. Add a campaign to track Psyop phase progress and bonuses.
OrgConflict.RIPPenaltyTooltip: RIP penalises Influence and Comms rolls.
OrgConflict.RIPPentTooltip: RIP penalises Influence and Comms rolls.
OrgConflict.MIPPenaltyTooltip: MIP penalises Force and Intel rolls.
OrgConflict.MIPPentTooltip: MIP penalises Force and Intel rolls.
OrgConflict.OnlineAllegianceEliteHackers: Elite hackers — L33t+2 Grok+1 Pwn+1 Phreak+2 (×3 cost)
OrgConflict.OnlineAllegianceMaliciousInsiders: Malicious insiders — L33t−1 Grok+2 Pwn+2 Phreak−1
OrgConflict.OnlineAllegianceStateSponsored: State-sponsored — L33t+2 Grok+1 Pwn+2 Phreak+2 (×2 cost)
State-sponsored — L33t+2 Grok+1 Pwn+2 Phreak+2 (×2 cost)
OrgConflict.PhysicalSizeCountTooltip: Units: {count} of {cap} max (Size ÷ 2 + 1). Activation: 2 MP each.
OrgConflict.EspionageSizeCountTooltip: Units: {count} of {cap} max (Size ÷ 3 + 1). Activation: 1 MP + 1 RP each.
OrgConflict.OnlineSizeCountTooltip: Units: {count} of {cap} max (Budget ÷ 2 + 1). Activation: 2 RP each.
OrgConflict.PsyopsSizeCountTooltip: Units: {count} of {cap} max ((Size + Budget) ÷ 4 + 1). Activation: 1 MP + 2 RP each.
OrgConflict.PhysicalHintFull: Contributes to Force. Aspects rated 0–{cap} (size cap).
OrgConflict.EspionageHintFull: Contributes to Intel. Aspects rated 0–{cap} (size cap).
OrgConflict.OnlineHintFull: Contributes to Comms. Aspects rated 0–{cap} (size cap).
OrgConflict.PsyopsHintFull: Contributes to Influence. Aspects rated 0–{cap} (size cap). Shade modifies Ruthlessness and Sympathizers costs and caps.
OrgConflict.AspectL33tTooltip: L33t (coding skill): 1MP 2RP/pt · cap {cap} (size + allegiance mod) · costs {mp}MP {rp}RP
OrgConflict.AspectGrokTooltip: Grok (cultural/tech understanding): 1MP 1RP/pt · cap {cap} (size + allegiance mod) · costs {mp}MP {rp}RP
OrgConflict.AspectPwnTooltip: Pwn (viciousness / law-breaking): 1MP 2RP/pt · cap {cap} (size + allegiance mod) · costs {mp}MP {rp}RP
OrgConflict.AspectSympathizersTooltip: Sympathizers: 2MP 2RP/pt · cap {cap} · costs {mp}MP {rp}RP · drives Psyop phase bonus
